mapper.insert: insert into nx_dis_sandbox_day_time_window (`nx_dsdtw_distributer_id`, `nx_dsdtw_route_date`, `nx_dsdtw_dep_father_id`, `nx_dsdtw_earliest_delivery_time_s`, `nx_dsdtw_latest_delivery_time_s`, `nx_dsdtw_service_minutes`, `nx_dsdtw_adjust_reason`, `nx_dsdtw_operator_user_id`, `nx_dsdtw_updated_at`) values (#{nxDsdtwDistributerId}, #{nxDsdtwRouteDate}, #{nxDsdtwDepFatherId}, #{nxDsdtwEarliestDeliveryTimeS}, #{nxDsdtwLatestDeliveryTimeS}, #{nxDsdtwServiceMinutes}, #{nxDsdtwAdjustReason}, #{nxDsdtwOperatorUserId}, #{nxDsdtwUpdatedAt}) on duplicate key update `nx_dsdtw_earliest_delivery_time_s` = values(`nx_dsdtw_earliest_delivery_time_s`), `nx_dsdtw_latest_delivery_time_s` = values(`nx_dsdtw_latest_delivery_time_s`), `nx_dsdtw_service_minutes` = values(`nx_dsdtw_service_minutes`), `nx_dsdtw_adjust_reason` = values(`nx_dsdtw_adjust_reason`), `nx_dsdtw_operator_user_id` = values(`nx_dsdtw_operator_user_id`), `nx_dsdtw_updated_at` = values(`nx_dsdtw_updated_at`)
